name: oculibis-slides
description: Marp slides introducing oculibis (multi-repo PR auto-review bot on Codex CLI + GitHub App)

scripts.diagrams: for d in overview; do mmdc -i diagrams/$d.mmd -o images/$d.svg -p diagrams/puppeteer.json -c diagrams/mermaid.json -b transparent; done
scripts.build: marp slides.md -o build/slides.html --html && cp -r images build/
scripts.build:pages: marp slides.md -o public/index.html --html && cp -r images public/

author: Daiji Yamashita
